title: After more than a decade of uncertainty, this interpretation will provide market participants with a clear understanding of how the SEC treats crypto assets
message_html: After more than a decade of uncertainty, this interpretation will provide market participants with a clear understanding of how the SEC treats crypto assets ...
snippet: Paul Atkins (@SECPaulSAtkins): After more than a decade of uncertainty, this interpretation will provide market participants with a clear understanding of how the SEC treats crypto assets under federal securities laws.
